name: Player Info
description: Detailed snapshot: job, HP, MP, gil, zone, position
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local jn = {}
for k,v in pairs(xi.job) do jn[v]=k end
local x,y,z = p:getPos()
return string.format(
  '%s | %s%d/%s%d | HP:%d/%d MP:%d/%d | Gil:%d | Zone:%d | Pos:(%.1f,%.1f,%.1f)',
  p:getName(), jn[p:getMainJob()]or'?', p:getMainLvl(),
  jn[p:getSubJob()]or'?', p:getSubLvl(),
  p:getHP(), p:getMaxHP(), p:getMP(), p:getMaxMP(),
  p:getGil(), p:getZoneID(), x, y, z
)

name: Full Heal
description: Restore HP and MP to max for a player
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
p:addHP(p:getMaxHP())
p:addMP(p:getMaxMP())
return p:getName()..' healed to full'

name: Add Gil
description: Give a player a specific amount of gil
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local amount = 100000
p:addGil(amount)
return p:getName()..' now has '..p:getGil()..' gil'

name: Add EXP
description: Give a player experience points on their main job
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local exp = 10000
p:addExp(exp)
return p:getName()..' received '..exp..' exp'

name: Set Merit Points
description: Set a player's total merit point count (0–127)
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local amount = 30
p:setMerits(amount)
return p:getName()..' now has '..p:getMeritCount()..' merits'

name: Add Capacity Points
description: Add capacity points to a player's current main job
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local amount = 5000
p:addCapacityPoints(amount)
return p:getName()..' received '..amount..' capacity points'

name: Add Job Points
description: Add job points to a player's current main job (max 500)
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local jp = 100
p:addJobPoints(p:getMainJob(), jp)
return p:getName()..' received '..jp..' job points'

name: Add Sparks of Eminence
description: Add sparks currency to a player
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local amount = 10000
p:addCurrency('spark_of_eminence', amount)
return p:getName()..' received '..amount..' sparks. Total: '..p:getCurrency('spark_of_eminence')

name: Add Accolades
description: Add unity accolades to a player
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local amount = 1000
p:addCurrency('unity_accolades', amount)
return p:getName()..' received '..amount..' accolades. Total: '..p:getCurrency('unity_accolades')

name: Clear Status Effects
description: Remove all detrimental status effects from a player
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
p:delStatusEffectsByFlag(xi.effectFlag.DETRIMENTAL)
return 'Status effects cleared for '..p:getName()

name: Warp to Home Point
description: Warp a player to their home point
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
p:warp()
return p:getName()..' warped to home point'

name: Set Zone Weather
description: Set weather in a player's current zone (player must be online in that zone)
code:
-- xi.weather constants: NONE=0, SUNSHINE=1, CLOUDS=2, FOG=3, WIND=4,
-- WINDY_CLOUDS=5, RAIN=6, SQUALL=7, THUNDER=8, THUNDERSTORM=9,
-- SNOW=10, BLIZZARD=11, SANDSTORM=12, HOT_SPELL=14, GLOOM=16
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local weather = xi.weather.RAIN
p:setWeather(weather)
return 'Weather set in zone '..p:getZoneID()

name: Spawn Mob by ID
description: Force-spawn a mob by its entity ID from mob_spawn_points table
code:
local mobId = 0  -- replace with mobid from mob_spawn_points table
local mob = GetMobByID(mobId)
if not mob then return 'Mob ID not found' end
if mob:isSpawned() then return mob:getName()..' is already spawned' end
SpawnMob(mob:getID())
return 'Spawned: '..mob:getName()

name: Despawn Mob by ID
description: Despawn a specific live mob by its entity ID
code:
local mobId = 0  -- replace with live entity ID
local mob = GetMobByID(mobId)
if not mob then return 'Mob not found' end
local name = mob:getName()
DespawnMob(mobId)
return 'Despawned: '..name

name: Add Key Item
description: Give a player a key item by ID (see DB tab → Key Items)
code:
local p = GetPlayerByName('CharName')
if not p then return 'Player not found' end
local kiId = 1  -- replace with key item ID
p:addKeyItem(kiId)
return 'Key item '..kiId..' added to '..p:getName()
